message:
refactor(connectors): delegate implementations to franken_agent_detection crate

The codex, cursor, openclaw, and opencode connectors have been slimmed
down to thin re-export stubs now that their full implementations live in
the franken_agent_detection (FAD) crate.  The mod.rs gains the
get_connector_factories() function that was previously duplicated in
the indexer, and the Cargo.toml feature flags for FAD now include
"cursor" and "opencode" to enable the newly-extracted connectors.

This eliminates ~7000 lines of duplicated connector logic and ensures
the single-source-of-truth for agent detection lives in FAD, which is
shared across frankensearch and cass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
